questions.question: Design and implement a three-node point-to-point network with duplex links between them. Describe the topology and explain the functionality of 802.3x flow control in this setup.

Calculate the maximum bandwidth of the three-node point-to-point network with duplex links. Assume each link has a duplex bandwidth of 1 Gbps and the nodes are connected in a star topology. Round your answer to two decimal places.
Explain the effect of 802.3x flow control on the network when one node sends a large amount of data to the other nodes. Provide a diagram to illustrate your explanation.
